scripts.lint:firefox: web-ext lint --source-dir . --ignore-files package.json package-lock.json amo-metadata.json DESIGN.md "manifests/**" "scripts/**" "dist/**" ".github/**" "artifacts/**"
scripts.build:firefox: web-ext build --source-dir . --artifacts-dir artifacts --overwrite-dest --ignore-files package.json package-lock.json amo-metadata.json DESIGN.md "manifests/**" "scripts/**" "dist/**" ".github/**" "artifacts/**"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:firefox && npm run build:chrome
scripts.publish:amo: web-ext sign --source-dir . --artifacts-dir artifacts --channel listed --amo-metadata amo-metadata.json --ignore-files package.json package-lock.json amo-metadata.json DESIGN.md "manifests/**" "scripts/**" "dist/**" ".github/**" "artifacts/**"
